candidates.title: Inventory reserve off-by-one — last unit unavailable
candidates.text: Postmortem: customers reported 500s when reserving the final unit of a SKU. Root cause: boundary check in reserve() used strict greater-than, so the last available unit could never be reserved. Fix: change to >= on the stock comparison. Services: inventory-service, checkout-service. Remediation: deploy patch, backfill failed orders.

candidates.title: Payment gateway 503 during peak traffic
candidates.text: Third-party Stripe timeout during Black Friday. Rate limited. Services: payment-service. Remediation: raise retry budget, add circuit breaker.

candidates.title: Notification service queue backup
candidates.text: SMS backlog after twilio webhook flap. notification-service queue depth 50k. Drained in 40 minutes. Remediation: auto-scale workers on queue depth metric.

candidates.title: Inventory negative stock after promo
candidates.text: Promo overflow caused oversold skus; reconciled manually. services: inventory-service. Remediation: atomic decrement with CAS.

candidates.title: Order service latency spike — thread pool exhaustion
candidates.text: Tomcat maxThreads saturated after traffic burst. services: java-order-service. Remediation: bump maxThreads, add async handler.
